name: Creative Inventory Action
desc: Player sets the contents of a slot in creative mode. Used to spawn items or modify inventory contents directly.

fields.name: slotId
fields.desc: Slot index (-1 for cursor, 0-44 for inventory, 100-104 for armor)

notes: Only processed by the server if the player is in creative mode (gamemode=1). Ignored silently in survival. Can set ANY slot including armor (100-104) and offhand slots. No known hacked client modules directly target this packet — it's used by vanilla creative mode mechanics. Gugustus has a CreativeGive command that constructs C10 via addToSendQueue.

modules.name: CreativeFly
modules.purpose: Drop/set items in creative mode. Used by creative-mode exploits.

modules.name: CreativeGive
modules.purpose: Drop/set items in creative mode. Used by creative-mode exploits.
